items.title: Trump says he called off new Iran attack at request of Gulf states
items.summary: The US president says he is holding off on a US attack planned for Tuesday as "serious negotiations are now taking place".

items.title: At least 100 dead in Ebola outbreak in DR Congo, official says
items.summary: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared the outbreak an international emergency.

items.title: What is Ebola and why is stopping this outbreak so difficult?
items.summary: An outbreak of Ebola in DR Congo involves a rare strain and is in an area affected by conflict.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 川普：原定5/19對伊朗發動攻擊　應中東國家要求暫緩
items.summary: 美國與伊朗和談陷僵局之際，美國總統川普今天表示，他應卡達、沙烏地及阿聯等中東國家領袖請求，已下令美軍延緩原定明天對伊朗發動軍事攻擊的計畫，但若無法達成可接受的協議，美軍須依指示立即向伊朗展開...…

items.title: 美國與伊朗和談陷僵局　川普稱不考慮對德黑蘭讓步
items.summary: 美國總統川普今天告訴「紐約郵報」，在收到伊朗就和平協議談判所做出令人失望的最新回應後，他對於向德黑蘭當局做出任何讓步「並不抱持開放態度」。  川普（Donald Trump）接受紐約郵報（N...…

items.title: 民主剛果1美國人確診伊波拉　美機場加強防疫篩檢
items.summary: 剛果民主共和國爆發伊波拉疫情，美國疾病管制暨預防中心今天表示，1名美國人確診，同時宣布加強防疫措施，包括對來自疫情地區的航空旅客進行篩檢，並暫停疫情地區的簽證服務。  在美國疾病管制暨預防中...…
